text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower improved significantly during this
summer camp. She seems more confident, too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Pheeew.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I had the urge to go for another run, but I held
back.
choice_data_list: Running's all you've been doing, though.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I know I ran a whole bunch during camp,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to run in a race as soon as I can... I can
hardly wait!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If only every day was race day...
choice_data_list: Let's just get back to the academy first.
Let's just get back to the academy first.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Good point.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thanks for all your hard work!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I will! You do the same, Trainer! See you
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing Nishino Flower to her dorm, I start
heading back to the academy to get some work
done, but just then...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Summer camp sure was searing hot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My body still feels like it's on fire, so I wanted to
find a nice, quiet place to rest.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I feel like it's gonna take a while to fall
asleep, so can you keep me company till I drift
off?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You already know this, but Flower really loves
plants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some idle chatter, Seiun Sky shifts the
conversation to something more serious.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Most of all, she loves the little, cute flowers that
try to bloom using every ounce of strength they
have.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Do you know what she said when I asked her why?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's because they give her courage.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She said it makes her happy to think that one day
she'll be able to bloom as beautifully as they do.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if I find that admirable... Maybe it's
that she's too humble... Or perhaps she lacks
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, those flowers of hers are only able to bloom
so beautifully because there's someone who cares
for them and wishes them the best, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter if we're talking about plants, or
a small Umamusume—nothing blossoms like that
on their own.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She's always the one giving, but she feels like
she's on the receiving end. Maybe it's because of
how kind she is...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But she doesn't have confidence in her own
abilities. At least, that's the feeling I get.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nah, that's not what I'm saying.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Though I suppose it is really easy to forget those times you're praised.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I think it's great to have someone
really close to you constantly remind you of how
awesome you are. Or something like that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What is?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're a simple one, aren'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It struck me a while back but... you two really are
peas in a pod.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... I'm getting real sleepy now...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Welp, looks like things will be fine, so nighty
night...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, our first summer camp ends on a
calm note.
